topic_text: When Indoor temperature less than from ecobee, do Set comfort profile until next transition using ecobee. Ecobee heating mode. Sets to a heating profile if temperature gets too low
When Indoor humidity greater than from ecobee, do Set hold for X hours using ecobee. Run AC If Humidity Too High. If your home is well sealed then you may have humidity issues like me.

When Outdoor temperature less than from ecobee, do Set comfort profile until next transition using ecobee. Heat pump optimization - hold constant indoor temperature below selected outdoor temp #avoidauxheat. Keeps thermostat in selected comfort profile (maintains constant temperature) when outdoor temperature falls below selected temperatureHelpful for heat pump users attempting to minimize aux heat usageUse in conjunction with other #avoidauxheat recipe.

When Current temperature drops below from Weather Underground, do Set comfort profile until next transition using ecobee. If outdoor temperature drops below 82ÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂ°F, then set comfort profile until next transition (because Ecobee outdoor temp is delayed)

When Current temperature drops below from Weather Underground, do Set hold for X hours using ecobee. If it is very cold, run the heating a little extra to prevent frozen pipes. This can be used to heat an old house with pipes on an outside wall to lower the risk of pipes freezing.

When Current temperature rises above from Weather Underground, do Set hold until next transition using ecobee. Hot Day Cool House. When it gets really hot make your house just a bit cooler without having to think about it.

When Switched on from SmartThings, do Set comfort profile for X hours using ecobee. If away, change Ecobee to Away.. If switch is turned on, change Ecobee schedule to AwayRequires a physical switch or virtual switch configured in SmartThings that reflects presence statusCan be used in conjunction with SmartApps to change switch status based on presence devices.

When Sensor activated from SkylinkNet, do Set comfort profile until next transition using ecobee. If Skylinknet detects motion, set Ecobee to Home. Allows other sensors in your home (Skylinknet) to notify Ecobee that you are home and set the temperature accordingly Useful if Ecobee is not in a high traffic area Skylinknet sensors are less expensive than Ecobee

When Every day of the week at from Date & Time, do Set hold for X hours using ecobee. Warm up the house before I wake up.. The ecobee app only allows for 3 different temp settings: home, away, and sleepWhen I wake up in the morning, I want the house a little warm, but it's a waste to heat it all the way up just for me to leave the house less than an hour laterThis recipe allows you to customize another temperature setting just for waking up.

When Every day of the week at from Date & Time, do Set hold for X hours using ecobee. Warm up the house for  Thursday book club meetings. This method allows you to turn off this recipe when book club moves for a month to someone else's place.

When Indoor humidity greater than from ecobee, do Set hold until next transition using ecobee. Control Humidity with ecobee. If the indoor humidity is high, I let ecobee cool the rooms down to control humidity.

When Every day at from Date & Time, do Set hold for X hours using ecobee. Have ecobee3 raise the temperature during OG&E smart hours.. This will raise the temperature to 79 degree's from 2:00PM to 7:00PM.
When You enter an area from Location, do Set comfort profile until next transition using ecobee. Ecobee - Near home. When you're close to home, activate Ecobee

When Presence detected from SmartThings, do Set comfort profile until next transition using ecobee. Set ecobee to home when SmartThings detects you've arrived.. When you SmartThings presence sensor is detected, change the ecobee's comfort setting to "Home"

When You exit an area from Location, do Set comfort profile until next transition using ecobee. Leave area, Set Away - Ecobee. When you leave your geo-fence of your home it will set your Ecobee to Away mode.

When Opened from SmartThings, do Set hold until next transition using ecobee. Adjust my Ecobee temp when a window opens. this recipe adjusts your Ecobee to a higher temp if you open a window when used with SmartThings and a contact sensor
When You exit an area from Location, do Set comfort profile until next transition using ecobee. Leaving home!. When you leave a specified area, your ecobee sets to away.

When You enter an area from Location, do Set comfort profile until next transition using ecobee. Cool down since i'm home early.. Find an area that is close to home, select your ecobee thermostat, and select your desired comfort profile.

When You enter an area from Location, do Set comfort profile until next transition using ecobee. Switch your Ecobee to 'Home' comfort profile as you arrive home. Automatically activate your Ecobee to Home comfort profile as you approach home.

When You exit an area from Location, do Set comfort profile until next transition using ecobee. If You exit an area, then set comfort profile to Away until next transition. If You exit an area, then set comfort profile to Away until next transition

When You exit an area from Location, do Set comfort profile until next transition using ecobee. When I leave the office, set my ecobee to Home. Is it 5 yet? Yes it is, let's get outta here! Use this recipe to set your thermostat to Home as soon as you leave work.

When You exit an area from Location, do Set comfort profile until next transition using ecobee. Geofence - Immediate Away Mode. Quick and easy geofence recipe! This recipe is designed to set your thermostat to AWAY mode when you leave your home/officeDon't wait 2+ hours for your thermostat to automatically switch to AWAY modeSave energy sooner!* First put in your address then select how big you want the zone to beThis triggers the action when you CROSS OUT of the zone barrier ONLY [ie: going to work/shopping/school]* Next select your THERMOSTAT NAME! [Upstairs/Downstairs/etc.] To use multiple thermostats simply copy your recipe for each thermostat.* Lastly, select your desired COMFORT PROFILE upon leaving home/office [AWAY by default]Change as desired.

When You exit an area from Location, do Set comfort profile until next transition using ecobee. Set ecobee away when you leave an area. this statement will check your phone location and if you are outside of a set area your ecobee will be set as away.
When You exit an area from Location, do Set comfort profile until next transition using ecobee. Set Ecobee to 'away' when I leave area. Set your ecobee to away when you leave town.

When You exit an area from Location, do Set comfort profile until next transition using ecobee. Set your Ecobee3 comfort profile immediately to Away when you leave home.. This allows your Ecobee3 to go into Away mode immediately when you leave home instead of waiting 2 hours for Smart Away to kick in.

When You exit an area from Location, do Set comfort profile until next transition using ecobee. Set ecobee away when you leave an area. This statement will allow you to select your comfort level when leaving a set area

When You exit an area from Location, do Set comfort profile for X hours using ecobee. Ecobee Short Away. create a occupied custom comfort profile on your Ecobee called "Short Away" with a set point between your home and away set pointsAfter 2 hours auto away will kick in!

When You enter an area from Location, do Set comfort profile until next transition using ecobee. Geofence - Return Home Mode. Quick and easy geofence Applet! This Applet is designed to set your thermostat to HOME mode BEFORE you get homeEspecially great if you program your thermostat temps to something higher/colder when AWAYThis allows the house to start cooling/warming up before you get home.* First put in your address then select how big you want the zone to beThis triggers the action when you CROSS INTO the zone barrier ONLY [ie: coming home]* Next select your THERMOSTAT NAME! [Upstairs/Downstairs/etc.] To use multiple thermostats simply copy your Applet for each thermostat.* Lastly, select your desired COMFORT PROFILE upon returning home [HOME by default]Change as desired.

When Outdoor temperature less than from ecobee, do Set comfort profile until next transition using ecobee. If it's nice outside during the summer then turn off A/C by setting Away. Use this in combination with "If it's nice outside during the summer then send a notification to open a window"  to turn off the A/C and remind you to open a window when it is cool enough outside

When Switched off from SmartThings, do Set comfort profile until next transition using ecobee. Virtual switch triggers profile change. use this to change Ecobee's profile when a virtual switch is triggered

When Indoor humidity greater than from ecobee, do Set hold for X hours using ecobee. If indoor humidity is too high, run the a/c for an hour.. If you don't have a dehumidifier you can use your a/c to dehumidify by running it for an hour.
When Indoor temperature greater than from ecobee, do Start watering time using Rachio. The house is on fire!. So your house is on fireLet's try to put it out, or at least prevent it from spreading...

When Indoor humidity less than from ecobee, do Resume program using ecobee. Resume Normal Schedule when humidity drops to acceptable level. Select Thermostat Name and Set acceptable humidity level This is meant to be used in conjunction with "Lower Temp when High humidity" Recipe ID 459046 (https://ifttt.com/recipes/459046).
When Indoor temperature greater than from ecobee, do Set hold for X hours using ecobee. Cool House if too Hot. If someone makes the house too hotthis will give some relief.

When Indoor humidity greater than from ecobee, do Set hold for X hours using ecobee. Lower Temp when High humidity. Select Thermostat Name, Set Humidity Level, Set Lower than normal Temp, Set how long to run for I will create an additional Applet to set to normal when humidity level drops below a certain point.
